texto: The creative act is not performed by the artist alone
autor: the spectator brings the work in contact with the external world by deciphering and interpreting its inner qualifications and thus adds his contribution to the creative act.
explicacao: Citação de the spectator brings the work in contact with the external world by deciphering and interpreting its inner qualifications and thus adds his contribution to the creative act. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The creative act is not performed by the artist alone” articula reflexao, marcel-duchamp, creative em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
